CustomField.formula: CASE(Text(leaseworks__Transaction_Type_PL__c) ,'Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),null, leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) ,'Payable', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c),null, leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'Letter Of Credit', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__c),null, IF(leaseworks__Status_F__c == 'Active',leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.leaseworks__Start_Date__c, IF(leaseworks__Status_F__c == 'Pending',leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.leaseworks__Start_Date__c, IF(leaseworks__Status_F__c == 'Inactive',leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.leaseworks__Expiry_Date__c,TODAY())))) ,'Payment', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c) ,'Offset', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c) ,'Payout', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payouts__c ), null, leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'LoC DrawDown', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__c ),null,leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__r.leaseworks__Approved_On__c) ,null)
CustomField.label: Transaction Date
